body:
I. Don't. Think. So. | Friend --

Last night, after Bernie Sanders won Wisconsin, his campaign manager went on CNN to accuse our team of destroying the Democratic Party to "satisfy the Secretary’s ambition to become President of the United States."

I. Don’t. Think. So.

Our team has more wins than Bernie’s, more delegates, and over 2 million more votes. We’re building the biggest and by far the most diverse coalition in this election, we’re strengthening the Democratic Party in the states, and we’re ready to do what it takes to win the White House and build a brighter future.

Ambitious? You’re damn right we are. We have big dreams for our country, and we’re going to fight to make them happen -- that starts with winning this primary once and for all.

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: BREAKING: New Polls
body:
Two new polls are out in Maryland and New York showing Gov.
Kasich is in second place and way ahead of Ted Cruz.

Peter, two new polls are out in
Maryland and New York showing Gov. Kasich is in second place and
way ahead of Ted Cruz!

And don't forget the ever-growing
list of national polls showing Gov. John Kasich is the ONLY
Republican who can defeat Hillary Clinton.

We're just 102 days away from the
convention and it's critical that we finish strong in these
states to secure delegates and continue denying Trump from
securing the nomination.

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

If the Party wants to stop Donald
Trump, it's critical that we get behind John Kasich RIGHT NOW and
help him secure as many delegates as possible in New York,
Pennsylvania, Maryland, Connecticut, Delaware and Rhode Island!
Help grow our momentum!

John Weaver
Chief Strategist
JohnKasich.com

From the Wall Street Journal:

"Mr. Kasich did the public
service of winning Ohio's delegates - with which Mr. Trump might
have locked up the nomination - and he deserves a chance to see
if he can win Pennsylvania or pick up delegates in the East and
California. He has no hope of reaching 1,237 delegates before the
convention, but what Messrs. Trump and Cruz really fear is that
the convention might want to nominate a potential winner." Read
more (here).

name: Americans For Prosperity
subject: ever heard of green pork?
body:
| | [Web Version](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=612d6c6f3fa3b86edad727c35df4491a32b3deae31aabebda23fd039183e4457927e52a31775a255)
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=612d6c6f3fa3b86ee24b1bc6e242a202557cd67f91ddaf0704a69f50d2b3e311bbd9d4e0d4d5962a)
---
| | **_Green Eggs & Ham may be a classic, but how do you feel about green pork? _** _We do not like them in the House. We do not like them in the Senate. We do not like them here or there. We do not like them anywhere._[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=612d6c6f3fa3b86ea569ac8bb8ba405dc0de0cfbaf4809f0be4a5bb82556c5e17340c792d3f55c32 "piggy") We've heard politicians rail against "pork barrel" spending" for years, but too often their actions don't match their words. When a must-pass bill comes to the table - _no matter what it addresses_ \- politicians clamor to get it larded up with handouts to special interests. It could be a slush fund or it could be special tax carve outs, but either way, it costs us! And the latest round of pork? It's green! The Federal Aviation Administration needs to be reauthorized, but some in Congress want to make sure handouts for green energy firms get attached. _**The reason is simple...**_ The FAA bill is one of the **only must-pass** items left on the table this Spring. These handouts don't have to do with the FAA, it's just a way to get them through without a vigorous debate. These so called "riders" are yet another way that crony capitalism can thrive...Americans for Prosperity and our 2.8 million citizen activists will not stand for. Washington should know by now that attaching various special-interest handouts won't go unnoticed by the public! What's worse, many special handouts for wind energy produces were already extended a few months ago, as part of a "tax extenders" deal- that's when Congress sorts through all of these special provisions and decides which to keep. While we oppose these sorts of market-distorting subsidies across the board, that's the time to have the debate. We shouldn't be using must-pass bills to sneak through special favors. [If you oppose green pork too, you can let your Senator know by clicking right here! ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=612d6c6f3fa3b86e13b78271bbaac9e5163bfaf75fc3be395d27a8b386800aef278394470277fbf7 "If you oppose green pork too, you can let your Senator know by clicking right here! clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Green Eggs & Ham may be a classic, but how do you feel about green pork? We do not like them in the House. We do not like them in the Senate. We do not like them here or there. We do not like them anywhere. "piggy" We've heard politicians rail against "pork barrel" spending" for years, but too often their actions don't match their words. When a must-pass bill comes to the table - no matter what it addresses \- politicians clamor to get it larded up with handouts to special interests. It could be a slush fund or it could be special tax carve outs, but either way, it costs us! And the latest round of pork? It's green! The Federal Aviation Administration needs to be reauthorized, but some in Congress want to make sure handouts for green energy firms get attached. The reason is simple... The FAA bill is one of the only must-pass items left on the table this Spring. These handouts don't have to do with the FAA, it's just a way to get them through without a vigorous debate. These so called "riders" are yet another way that crony capitalism can thrive...Americans for Prosperity and our 2.8 million citizen activists will not stand for. Washington should know by now that attaching various special-interest handouts won't go unnoticed by the public! What's worse, many special handouts for wind energy produces were already extended a few months ago, as part of a "tax extenders" deal- that's when Congress sorts through all of these special provisions and decides which to keep. While we oppose these sorts of market-distorting subsidies across the board, that's the time to have the debate. We shouldn't be using must-pass bills to sneak through special favors. body:
| Peter -- Ted Strickland talks tough on China, but like many things, his record doesn't match his rhetoric. Recently, his record on China has been exposed with headlines like _Ted Strickland Was For Free Trade with China, Before He Was Against It_ and PolitiFact rated his previous China attack on Rob "false." Now, Strickland is actually criticizing Rob for supporting something Ted voted to support -- twice!

Today we are releasing our latest web ad "Twice” on our new website: [WeakOnChina.com](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=1). You can be one of the first to see “Twice” by visiting [WeakOnChina.com](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=2) today!

[](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=3) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2F77d4d&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=4) [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2F7c44&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=5) Rob Portman is the only candidate in this race who has a record of standing up to China – even opposing his own party to stop China's currency manipulation and protecting Ohio jobs when China cheats.

In Congress, Ted Strickland refused to vote to hold China accountable for unfair trade practices. As governor, despite his strong rhetoric, his administration opened a trade office in China and he even gave a $4 million taxpayer-funded loan to a now-bankrupt company with a Chinese factory. The truth is Ted's campaign wants to talk about anything except his record of cozying up to China.

Ted’s latest actions are yet another reason why Ohio can't afford to go back to Ted Strickland's Ohio when the state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation.

Please visit [WeakOnChina.com](http://www.weakonchina.com/?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=twice_blast&n=6) to watch our new video and help us make sure Ohio voters see "Twice" by donating today. name: Bernie Sanders 2016
subject: From down 38 to just SIX in Pennsylvania
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
It's happening again...
In primary after primary in this campaign, we'll get to a state and find ourselves down 30, 40 points or more. But then we get our field operation running, start talking to voters, run a few ads, and people contribute to fund that operation. Then we find ourselves down 20 points, then 10, then single digits...and then we win. Check this out:

body:
Senator Johnson, it's time to do your job. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4227/1c469400/5e99d21/351e1e4/794751946/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/do-your-job?utm_source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&utm_campaign=dscc-ja&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- Here's something you might not know: **two** Senate Republicans have decided to break ranks and consider President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Judge Merrick Garland. These Republican senators are finally going to do the job they were elected to do, the job that American taxpayers pay them to do. But sadly, the majority of Republican senators won't join them -- and that includes Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson. _Enough._ Senator Johnson and his colleagues need to give Judge Garland full and fair consideration. They simply need to do their jobs. And we're joining with the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC) to call on them to do the right thing. Will you join us in keeping up the pressure? **[Join Russ and the DSCC. Tell Senator Johnson and Senate Republicans: We're not going to let up on this. It's time to do your job!](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4227/1c469400/5e99d21/351e1e4/794751946/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/do-your-job?utm_source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&utm_campaign=dscc-ja&utm_medium=ema")** Across Wisconsin, folks are telling Russ they want a senator who will work for the people, not the special interests. But Senator Johnson's corporate bosses have given him their marching orders (with a side of three super PACs). We have to keep the pressure on Senator Johnson and his colleagues. **[Sign the petition today. Tell Senator Johnson and Senate Republicans: Do your job!](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4227/1c469400/5e99d21/351e1e4/794751946/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/do-your-job?utm_source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&source=ema_2016-04-07_dscc-ja&utm_campaign=dscc-ja&utm_medium=ema")** Thanks for standing with us. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Holding "the high ground"
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a85/3476a20e/c71e8cc/2745d3ec/2541956122/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, This campaign has been about earning people's trust in Pennsylvania - because without the trust of those you serve, how can one govern? General John Buford on that first day of Gettysburg wisely predicted that the key to winning was holding the "high ground" in the upcoming battle, or, as he warned, there will be "the devil to pay." But the high ground he was defending was also the Union's moral high ground for a nation to be free from the stain of slavery. While my party's power holders in DC have said there would be "the devil to pay" because of my independent stance on earning the people's trust - above party, above type - we are ahead in the polls, because we are focused on people. **[Please contribute $10, $20, $40, $80 ... to ensure we win for people ](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a85/3476a20e/c71e8cc/2745d3eb/2541956122/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0407FB2p1&amounts=10,20,40,80,100,250,500")- and please read the article below from POLITICO about my independent stand on "the high ground" as opposed to DC's**: | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a85/3476a20e/c71e8cc/2745d3ea/2541956122/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0407FB2b1&amounts=10,20,40,80,100,250,500")
---

DREXEL HILL, Pa. -- There's no ideological civil war underway here. No, this is all personal -- just former Navy Adm. Joe Sestak making his last stand against Democratic Party leaders who've been trying to sink him for six years and counting. On paper, Sestak is about everything Democrats could want in a Senate candidate: a charismatic, decorated veteran elected to the House from a swing district who nearly defeated Republican Pat Toomey in 2010, one of the toughest election years for Democrats in decades. But the independent streak that attracts voters is precisely what worries national Democrats so much about Sestak... [excerpt from article linked below]

Warmly,
Joe
